calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set-Aside Dismissal And Reopen Case
Off Calendar Nov-28-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DEONTE WALKER's Motion To Set-Aside Dismissal And Reopen Case.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Pro per plaintiff's "motion to set aside dismissal and reopen case" is denied. The case was dismissed 16 months ago for failure to comply with CCP 583.210 (service within three years). CCP 583.210, under which dismissal is mandatory, is not addressed in plaintiff's motion. (Edmon & Karnow, California Practice Guide: Civil Procedure Before Trial (TRG 2016) 11:51.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to CCP Section 583.210 and Section 583.250. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
TAMARA REED present as the sister of plaintiff Deonte Walker;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint.

The Court orients Ms. Reed as to the consequences of the Court's tentative ruling.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.
